name: Sour Cream Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, cornstarch, lemon rind, juice, egg yolks, and milk in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until thick.
3. Stir in butter and cool mixture to room temperature.
4. Stir in sour cream.
5. Pour filling into pie shell.
6. Cover with whipped cream.
7. Garnish with lemon twists.
8. Store in refrigerator.
